rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., the comparison of BLEURT-20's relative position to COMET-22 and MetricX-23).
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested, focusing on the method rather than the scope adherence.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the agent does not identify harmful patterns in the original).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
